name: Collapsible Details Section
summary: HelpContent with `variant: details` to create a click-to-expand section for long instructions
whenToUse: Long instructional text that would clutter the form if always visible
Optional reference information users may already be familiar with
Calculation instructions like 'How to calculate household income'

uiSchema.label: How to calculate your household income

options.help: Household income is based on line 15000 (gross income) minus applicable amounts.

help: Line 33099 (medical expenses for self, spouse or common-law partner)

notes: Set `options.variant` to `"details"` to make the section collapsible
The `label` becomes the clickable title that expands/collapses the details
Nested `elements` contain the detail content revealed when expanded
Array in `help` renders as a bulleted list; string renders as a paragraph
This keeps forms clean while preserving access to reference information
